name: Recommended wedge and MVP scope
summary: PRIMARY beachhead (updated): Pre-customer product validation — founders and builders evaluate THEIR OWN SaaS/tool/website using synthetic company context and persona agents before real users exist. The evaluated artifact is always the builder's product; Slack/Jira/CRM are supporting context. SECONDARY: B2B SaaS SE pre-POC rehearsal. MVP v0 (4 weeks): browser journeys + 3 personas + 5 flows + markdown scorecard on one staging URL; no MiroFish, no full enterprise twin required. v1 adds integration mocks (VEI-style) if needed.
key_findings: Easier to test than SE: builder is buyer; dogfood any URL; PLG possible; Veris/VEI adjacent not headline; UserTesting/Maze compete on human feedback not synthetic company; Week 1 test = one URL session with agent
implications: Category: Product Rehearsal or Synthetic Beta; GTM: founders on X, indie hackers, YC apps; Price low initially; SE wedge after 10 paying builders; First design partners: 5 pre-launch founders not SE leaders
